data.body:

data.body:
A natural flea repellent spray I use for blanket and rugs marketed as safe for bunnies and cat and vet rec’d

I used it just now for the second time & it just put Mochi in respiratory distress :,)

Cinnamon, is in my closet with the door closed and the air purifier and nothing was sprayed in there
data.author: did:plc:qme7pahhiipcejekzpfmd2sc

data.body:
Once I realized what it could be I got Mochi out of my room, and won’t be allowing Cinnamon out of their crate for the night and have my window open. 

Mochi seems okay now and is drinking water, I feel so awful, because I really trusted the bunny brand (Small Pet Select) and it got my kitty hurt :(
